hero.tagline: Authentic Italian cuisine in the heart of the Mediterranean. Tradition, premium ingredients and passion in every dish.

home.philosophyQuote: Every dish is a journey to Italy, crafted with the finest ingredients and the recipe of tradition
home.ctaText: A unique gastronomic experience awaits you in Palma de Mallorca

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Premium Italian ingredients, prepared with time-honored recipes
menu.gfNote: Gluten free options available (+€2.50) — Ask your waiter
menu.allergens: For any information on substances and allergens, you can consult the specific documentation that will be provided, upon request, by the staff on duty.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A passion for Italian cuisine from the heart of Rome to Palma de Mallorca
about.essenceP1: Ambra was born from the passion to bring the most authentic flavors of Italy to the heart of Palma de Mallorca. Every ingredient is carefully selected, many of them imported directly from Italian producers with protected designation of origin.
about.essenceP2: Our pasta is fresh and made daily. Our meats are of the finest quality, with Black Angus cuts and selected beef. Fish arrives fresh from the Mediterranean every morning.
about.essenceP3: The Pinsa Romana, our specialty, is prepared with a long 72-hour fermentation dough, which gives it its unique texture: crispy on the outside and light on the inside.
about.traditionText: Recipes passed down from generation to generation, prepared with the respect they deserve.
about.qualityText: D.O.P. and I.G.P. ingredients imported directly from Italy to guarantee authenticity.
about.passionText: Every dish reflects our love for Italian cuisine and the desire to offer a unique experience.
about.locationText: In the heart of the city, where the Mediterranean breeze meets Italian tradition.

contact.title: Reservations
contact.subtitle: Book your table and enjoy an unforgettable Italian dining experience
contact.submittedText: We will contact you to confirm your reservation.
contact.name: Name
contact.tipText: For groups of more than 8 people, please contact us directly by phone to arrange your event.

footer.description: Authentic Italian cuisine in the heart of Palma de Mallorca. Tradition, quality and passion in every dish.
